sentences.arabic: تَوَقَّفَ الْمُسَافِرُ فِي وَسَطِ الصَّحْرَاءِ وَنَظَرَ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Putnik se zaustavio usred pustinje i pogledao u nebo.
sentences.translationEn: The traveller stopped in the middle of the desert and looked up at the sky.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْقَمَرُ كَبِيرًا وَمُضِيئًا كَأَنَّهُ قِنْدِيلٌ مُعَلَّقٌ فِي الظَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Mjesec je bio velik i sjajan kao fenjer obješen u tami.
sentences.translationEn: The moon was large and bright, like a lantern hung in the darkness.

sentences.arabic: سَادَ الصَّمْتُ مِنْ كُلِّ جِهَةٍ، وَكَانَتِ النُّجُومُ كَثِيرَةً لَا تُعَدُّ.
sentences.translation: Sa svih strana vladala je tišina, a zvijezda je bilo bezbroj.
sentences.translationEn: Silence reigned on all sides, and the stars were countless.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ الْمُسَافِرُ بِصِغَرِهِ أَمَامَ هَذَا الْجَمَالِ الْعَظِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Putnik je osjetio svoju malenkost pred tom velikom ljepotom.
sentences.translationEn: The traveller felt his own smallness before this great beauty.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ فِي مُذَكِّرَتِهِ: «لَمْ أَرَ فِي حَيَاتِي لَيْلَةً أَجْمَلَ مِنْ هَذِهِ.»
sentences.translation: U svoju bilježnicu zapisao je: 'U životu nisam vidio ljepše noći od ove.'
sentences.translationEn: He wrote in his journal: 'In my life I have never seen a night more beautiful than this.'
